validate.notes: Docker build passes. NOP test passes with reward=0 (3 f2p tests fail as expected on buggy base). Gold test passes with reward=1 (20/20 tests pass). Rubric judge issue: judge is designed for config file edits but rubric rules reference C++ style conventions. The gold fix DOES follow all rubric rules (Allman braces, no raw pointers, comments explain logic, uses local_idx), but judge extracts 0 config hunks since C++ files don't match CONFIG_RE pattern. This is a task design issue - rubric should be evaluated against code changes, not config files.
